reviews.review_description: I don't usually get scared. This game had me ripping off my headset at the monster full sprinting at me when I turned around. Not the greatest environment graphics, but even so, it feels like you are IN IT and INCREDIBLY immersive.
Game is great. Great atmosphere ! Must play if you like horror.

reviews.review_title: We need more immersive horror like this.
reviews.review_description: The environment, the torch light, the AI, and the concept of the Heart Lung Machines were all executed amazingly, especially considering the limited hardware power of the Quest. Hope the developer has more in their catalogue!

I can't say to much because I'm tooto scared to play this game .😄
But how I feel about this game is that it deserves 5 stars
Real scary atmosphere, I agree with 
A  comment saying it would be better to hear scuffing of your feet,  or heavy breathing ?
Would add to atmosphere.
Great game !!

I love this. Very well done. Creepy corroded environment, great sound design (no need for musical score), and a flashlight. 

The only reason why it’s not getting a 5 star rating (yet?) is because it’s a bit off-putting not to hear your own foot steps. Even if it was subtle in the mix of the environment it would help with the immersion.

It takes some immersion away because even without musical score and only environmental effects, the realistic environment setting would still have the sounds of your footsteps. IT NEEDS THAT. 

I actually may hold off on continuing the journey of this game until there’s a response to this being added in. 

Good job overall! I recommend.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your kind review and feedback! I'll definitely keep it in mind for future updates.

reviews.review_description:
First of all I will say the developer gave me the game to review and make content for BUT my honest opinion:

The environment is beautifully done, the mechanics work very well, the story is well told through the cassette players, the voice acting is quite good (As a voice actor I'm actually impressed) and I love the biomechanical creature theming.

Why it doesn't get a full 5 star rating is that I didn't actually get scared lol although pretty d°°° intense I didn't feel a personal sense of dread and unease. Maybe the death jumpscare could be varied or cranked up to 11 lol.

Still well worth the price point and has excellent replay value.

It's really scary, even though I'm only at level 1. It would need some optimization to run at decent FPS at a higher resolution than native. The low resolution causes noticeable pixelation and rough edges throughout the visuals. Quest Games Optimizer can do it, but once the resolution goes above 2000 pixels, the framerate starts to drop. I'm looking forward to further development and updates. Fingers crossed.

This game is so scary, couldn’t even get past the first 6 minutes, my brother played it and even he got scared from just seeing the monster. But when I wanted to get my mom to play she was kind of confused, she had never used a vr before, so if you could add a small tutorial board that would help a lot. But this would be way more fun and more scary if there was multiplayer,  but first there would need to be a full player model, maybe adding a voice chat  featurewhere it would echo and count as making noise. All these things would be very cool for this game and I hope they are in the next update!

After You play around a little bit , get to know the maps, and you can actually make this feel like Alien Isolation. Completely different but kinda the same feeling with hiding and surviving and even stalking the creatures. The quests have no time limit so you can turn this into a hide and seek style game .
Carrying a torche would make this even better with the real Time shadows 


The audio makes it perfect for that hide and seek style game 
Sehr gute Arbeit.

The game was an absolute thrill and I loved it. I absolutely love biological mechanical horror.
Would love to see more monsters like the one you deal with in the game and the type of entities we see at the end ￼
The only problem the game has is it stutters latency wise quite often, so the performance needs to be enhanced for smoother gameplay 
Other than that absolute fantastic . can’t wait to see the full game 💪🏻💪🏻💪🏻

reviews.review_title: I need a change of pants
reviews.review_description: The game is horrifying￼ even though it short the whispers get you and it’s story’s amazing but I wish it was longer and the monsters jump scare was better.

The game is scary 10/10 with unique atmosphere.
Graphics are nice, actually I decided to purchase this game when I saw dynamic shadows, it's a rare case in Quest games unfortunately.

But personally I don't like "inner voices" in the game, it breaks immersion for me, it's like a reminder it's not a real life, but just a game. Would be nice to have an option to disable voices.

Well done mechanics are good and simple 👏 graphics are fantastic, love to explore and nice save points which I'm a fan of progression then save. Be quiet and listen and be prepared to hide quietly 🤫 hint hint

reviews.review_title: Cant even open the game it just closes
reviews.review_description: I cant get 3 seconds without the app closing. Is this Quest 3 only and am I alone on this?

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry you're having trouble. The game officially supports only Quest 3, Quest 3s, and future devices, and won't run on older models. If you're on a Quest 3 or Quest 3s and still experiencing issues, please reach out at support [at] schreckstoff.com - I'd be happy to look into it!
